auto_approve.mechanism: always_allow_list: alwaysAllow tool names bypass confirmation prompts for that server

env_var_expansion.mechanism: env_variable_expansion: server env blocks accept environment variables so secrets can be referenced from the shell environment

oauth_support.mechanism: No OAuth 2.0 authentication flow documented for Roo Code MCP servers

resource_referencing.mechanism: MCP resource referencing is not documented as a first-class feature in Roo Code

tool_filtering.mechanism: per_server_tool_filtering: alwaysAllow and disabledTools arrays on each server entry filter which MCP tools are exposed and which bypass confirmation

transport_types.mechanism: transport_types: stdio, sse, and streamable-http are supported and selected via the type field on each server entry

providerExtensions.name: Three transport mechanisms
providerExtensions.summary: stdio, SSE, and streamable-http transports are selected via the type field on each server entry — note streamable-http is kebab-case, distinct from Cline's streamableHttp camelCase.

providerExtensions.name: alwaysAllow per-server allowlist
providerExtensions.summary: Array of tool names that skip the user confirmation prompt for that server; distinct from Cline's autoApprove field name.

providerExtensions.name: disabledTools per-server blocklist
providerExtensions.summary: Array of tool names hidden from the agent, applied alongside alwaysAllow on each server entry.

providerExtensions.name: watchPaths config-reload triggers
providerExtensions.summary: Array of filesystem paths that trigger a server reload when their contents change, useful for development iteration on stdio server binaries.

providerExtensions.name: Per-server disabled flag
providerExtensions.summary: Boolean disabled field on a server entry turns that server off without removing its configuration.

providerExtensions.name: Per-server timeout override
providerExtensions.summary: Numeric timeout field overrides the default MCP request timeout per server.
